side_effects.description: Massive head rush, felt like fainting, collapsed in bathroom, vomiting, diarrhea, severe dizziness, weakness, inability to walk, lips/eyes/neck swelling, stomach pain, periodic watery stool, continued weakness and dizziness for 36+ hours, persistent sneezing

protocol_notes: Product labeled as TB-500 (Thymosin Beta 4) 5mg - OP later realized it was actually TB4, not TB500. Previously used same batch 6 weeks prior with no reaction. Started BPC-157 and TB-500 2 months ago for 3 weeks, developed itchiness and stopped. Newly reconstituted with same BAC. Suspected anaphylaxis. Sourced from NAPS. Symptoms consistent with moderate anaphylaxis per multiple commenters.
